name: self_improving_coding_agent_maintenance_gate
source_summary: ngrok bmo self-improving coding-agent blog, Addy Osmani self-improving coding agents, Agent Lightning trajectory-credit framing
mechanism: Evaluate coding-agent maintenance sessions using validated task rate, tests, reflection capture, learning events, implemented improvements, repeated failures, and context drift.
boundary: maintenance gate is not a full RL trainer, fine-tuning pipeline, autonomous online learner, or claim of outperforming source projects.
